design_direction: premium, modern, clean, focused, productized, trustworthy

typography.headline: "Segoe UI Variable Display", "Segoe UI", "Aptos Display", sans-serif
hierarchy: display hero headline with short line length
body copy at 16-21px with generous leading

components: premium hero with trust badges and proof metrics
copy_rules: Lead with user value, not internal implementation.
Keep Free and Lifetime pricing simple: 10 free fills, $19 lifetime.
State local-only, no upload, and no cloud sync without overclaiming.
Do not mention legacy chatgpt2obsidian as a LeadFill config source.
Do not imply production payment is verified.
payment_safety_rules: Active entitlement must come from webhook-confirmed pay-site state.
No service role key, Waffo private key, merchant secret, or webhook secret in the client.

localization.note: English stays as the source-of-truth root version while secondary locales reuse the same visual system.
